IPL Data Analysis using Python¶

In this project, I have analyzed IPL ball-by-ball data to understand how matches unfold. The goal is to explore player performances, team strategies, and overall match patterns using data analysis techniques. Through this analysis, we can identify trends such as scoring patterns, key players, and factors that influence match outcomes.

In [46]:
import numpy as np 
import pandas as pd 
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt 
import seaborn as sns

8 rows × 26 columns

In [49]:
# Drop column safely
df.drop(columns=['Unnamed: 0'], inplace=True, errors='ignore')

# Convert date
df['date'] = pd.to_datetime(df['date'], errors='coerce')

# Handle missing values
df['wicket_kind'] = df['wicket_kind'].fillna('No Wicket')
df['player_out'] = df['player_out'].fillna('Not Out')

# Remove duplicates
df.drop_duplicates(subset=['match_id','innings','over','ball'], inplace=True)
In [50]:
df['runs_total'].value_counts().plot(kind='bar')
plt.title("Runs Distribution per Ball ")
plt.show()
In [58]:
top_batsmen = df.groupby('batter')['runs_batter'].sum().sort_values(ascending=False).head(10)
top_batsmen.plot(kind='pie')
plt.title("Top 10 Batsmen")
plt.show()
In [55]:
import seaborn as sns

top_batsmen = df.groupby('batter')['runs_batter'].sum().reset_index()
top_batsmen = top_batsmen.sort_values(by='runs_batter', ascending=False).head(10)

sns.barplot(x='runs_batter', y='batter', data=top_batsmen)
plt.title("Top 10 Batsmen")
plt.show()
In [59]:
runs_per_year = df.groupby('year')['runs_total'].sum()
runs_per_year.plot()
plt.title("Runs per Year")
plt.show()
In [60]:
runs_over = df.groupby('over')['runs_total'].sum()

runs_over.plot()
plt.title("Runs per Over")
plt.show()
In [72]:
wickets = df[df['wicket_kind'] != 'No Wicket']
top_bowlers = wickets.groupby('bowler').size().sort_values(ascending=False).head(10)
top_bowlers.plot(kind='bar')
plt.title("Top 10 Bowlers by Wickets")
plt.xlabel("Bowler")
plt.ylabel("Wickets")
plt.xticks(rotation=45)
plt.show()
In [75]:
wickets = df[df['wicket_kind'] != 'No Wicket']
top_bowlers = wickets.groupby('bowler').size().sort_values(ascending=False).head(10)
top_bowlers.plot(kind='pie')
plt.title("Top 10 Bowlers by Wickets")
plt.show()
In [79]:
bowler_runs = df.groupby('bowler')['runs_total'].sum()
bowler_balls = df.groupby('bowler')['ball'].count()
economy = (bowler_runs / bowler_balls) * 6
economy = economy.sort_values().head(10)
economy.plot(kind='bar')
plt.title("Best Economy Bowlers")
plt.ylabel("Economy Rate")
plt.show()
In [83]:
team_wickets = wickets.groupby('bowling_team').size().sort_values(ascending=False)
team_wickets.plot(kind='pie')
plt.title("Wickets by Team")
plt.show()
In [87]:
wickets_over = wickets.groupby('over').size()
wickets_over.plot()
plt.title("Wickets per Over")
plt.xlabel("Over")
plt.ylabel("Wickets")
plt.show()
In [88]:
runs_over = df.groupby('over')['runs_total'].sum()
runs_over.plot()
plt.title("Runs Conceded per Over")
plt.show()
In [89]:
bowler_avg = wickets.groupby('bowler').size() / df.groupby('bowler')['match_id'].nunique()
bowler_avg = bowler_avg.sort_values(ascending=False).head(10)
bowler_avg.plot(kind='bar')
plt.title("Most Consistent Bowlers")
plt.show()
In [91]:
dot_balls = df[df['runs_total'] == 0]
dot_ball_count = dot_balls.groupby('bowler').size().sort_values(ascending=False).head(10)
dot_ball_count.plot(kind='bar')
plt.title("Top Bowlers by Dot Balls")
plt.show()
In [95]:
runs_vs_wickets = df.groupby('over').agg({
    'runs_total': 'sum',
    'wicket_kind': lambda x: (x != 'No Wicket').sum()
})
runs_vs_wickets.plot()
plt.title("Runs vs Wickets per Over")
plt.show()
In [62]:
powerplay = df[df['over'] <= 6]['runs_total'].sum()
death = df[df['over'] >= 16]['runs_total'].sum()
print("Powerplay Runs:", powerplay)
print("Death Overs Runs:", death)

Powerplay Runs: 122630
Death Overs Runs: 76021
In [86]:
venue_runs = df.groupby('venue')['runs_total'].mean().sort_values(ascending=False).head(10)
venue_runs.plot(kind='bar')
plt.title("Top Venues by Avg Runs")
plt.show()
In [96]:
df['runs_total'].value_counts().sort_index().plot(kind='bar')
plt.title("Runs Distribution per Ball")
plt.xlabel("Runs")
plt.ylabel("Frequency")
plt.show()
In [100]:
boundaries = df[df['runs_batter'].isin([4,6])]
boundary_count = boundaries.groupby('batter').size().sort_values(ascending=False).head(10)
boundary_count.plot(kind='pie')
plt.title("Top Boundary Hitters")
plt.show()
In [101]:
runs_over = df.groupby('over')['runs_total'].sum()
runs_over.plot(marker='o')
plt.title("Runs Scored per Over")
plt.xlabel("Over")
plt.ylabel("Runs")
plt.show()
In [102]:
sample_match = df[df['match_id'] == df['match_id'].iloc[0]]
sample_match['cumulative_runs'] = sample_match['runs_total'].cumsum()
sample_match['cumulative_runs'].plot()
plt.title("Match Progression (Cumulative Runs)")
plt.xlabel("Ball")
plt.ylabel("Runs")
plt.show()

top_batsmen = df.groupby('batter')['runs_batter'].sum().sort_values(ascending=False).head(10)
top_batsmen.plot(kind='barh')
plt.title("Top 10 Batsmen")
plt.xlabel("Runs")
plt.show()
In [105]:
batter_runs = df.groupby('batter')['runs_batter'].sum()
batter_balls = df.groupby('batter').size()
strike_rate = (batter_runs / batter_balls) * 100
strike_rate = strike_rate.sort_values(ascending=False).head(10)
strike_rate.plot(kind='bar')
plt.title("Top Strike Rate Players")
plt.show()
In [106]:
df['strike_rate'] = (df['runs_batter'] / df['ball']) * 100
df['strike_rate'].plot(kind='hist', bins=20)
plt.title("Strike Rate Distribution")
plt.show()
In [107]:
wickets = df[df['wicket_kind'] != 'No Wicket']
top_bowlers = wickets.groupby('bowler').size().sort_values(ascending=False).head(10)
top_bowlers.plot(kind='barh')
plt.title("Top Wicket Takers")
plt.show()
In [108]:
runs_wickets = df.groupby('over').agg({
    'runs_total': 'sum',
    'wicket_kind': lambda x: (x != 'No Wicket').sum()
})
runs_wickets.plot()
plt.title("Runs vs Wickets per Over")
plt.show()
In [109]:
powerplay_runs = df[df['over'] <= 6]['runs_total'].sum()
death_runs = df[df['over'] >= 16]['runs_total'].sum()
plt.bar(['Powerplay','Death Overs'], [powerplay_runs, death_runs])
plt.title("Powerplay vs Death Overs Runs")
plt.show()
In [110]:
toss_win = df[df['toss_winner'] == df['match_won_by']]
toss_win_count = toss_win['toss_winner'].value_counts()
toss_win_count.plot(kind='bar')
plt.title("Toss Winner vs Match Winner")
plt.show()
In [112]:
venue_avg = df.groupby('venue')['runs_total'].mean().sort_values(ascending=False).head(10)
venue_avg.plot(kind='pie')
plt.title("High Scoring Venues")
plt.show()
In [113]:
df['run_rate'] = df['team_runs'] / df['overs']
run_rate_over = df.groupby('over')['run_rate'].mean()
run_rate_over.plot()
plt.title("Run Rate Trend")
plt.show()
In [114]:
runs_year = df.groupby('year')['runs_total'].sum()
runs_year.plot(marker='o')
plt.title("Runs per Year")
plt.show()
In [85]:
df['balls_remaining'] = (df['overs']*6) - ((df['over']-1)*6 + df['ball'])
df['wickets_left'] = 10 - df['team_wicket']
In [68]:
corr = df[['runs_total','team_runs','team_wicket','over']].corr()
import seaborn as sns
sns.heatmap(corr, annot=True)
plt.show()
